_meta.name: Language Detection — Out-of-Distribution Paraphrase Corpus
_meta.purpose: Queries the original script-only heuristic misses: Hinglish, Latin-script non-English, mixed-script, adversarial English shorts.
_meta.selection: Curated to expose script-detector failure modes; ground truth assigned by hand
